billing.securityNote: Premium data is served from an authenticated API, with restricted datasets kept outside the static GitHub Pages bundle.

plans.name: Free
plans.label: Public edition
features: Country risk, readiness, hazard, loss, and public finance indicators
Reported DRR-related ODA donor view from OECD CRS
World Bank, GCF, and OCHA public finance signals
Weekly automated refresh of public datasets

plans.name: Pro
plans.label: Individual analyst
features: IATI activity and transaction ledger after de-duplication
Domestic budget and disaster-fund evidence links where available
CSV exports and saved country briefs

plans.name: Institution
plans.label: Teams and research groups
features: Team access for project and country screening
Premium API access for internal dashboards
Methodology notes for donor, budget, private, and mainstreamed DRR finance
Priority ingestion requests for country case studies

premiumModules.title: IATI activity ledger
premiumModules.description: Activity-level finance records linked to recipient countries, donors, implementers, sectors, policy markers, and DRR/resilience keyword evidence.
premiumModules.caveat: Records are normalized with de-duplication across publisher, implementer, transaction, and activity levels.

premiumModules.title: Domestic budget evidence
premiumModules.description: Country evidence for national disaster funds, climate budget tagging, DRR budget lines, contingency funds, and Sendai-aligned expenditure documents.
premiumModules.caveat: Coverage is country-by-country, with confidence scores and source links.

premiumModules.title: Private and co-finance signals
premiumModules.description: Project document signals for private-sector resilience finance, insurer/reinsurer disclosures, GCF private-sector projects, and disclosed co-finance.
premiumModules.caveat: Evidence-linked project intelligence with finance type, source, and confidence labels.

premiumModules.title: Exports and API
premiumModules.description: Authenticated CSV exports and API responses for country profiles, donor breakdowns, project evidence, and source audit trails.
premiumModules.caveat: Restricted records are delivered through entitlement-checked API access.
